summary: Full backend + frontend e2e validation of iteration 2 (10 blob variants, system tray, new settings fields, ambient media states). All 9 backend tests and all 11 frontend flows passed.
critical_code_review_comments: MediaApp.playAudio() uses stale `mode`/`ambientState` inside setTimeout closure; logic still works because setAmbientState((prev)=>prev==='audio'?null:prev) is functional, but the `if (mode === 'audio' || ambientState === 'audio')` guard is effectively dead code (closure captures stale values). Harmless, but confusing.

rafVideoRef is assigned both setTimeout id and requestAnimationFrame id; cleanup only calls cancelAnimationFrame. When tab is hidden during video playback the scheduled setTimeout id leaks and is not cancelled. Low impact but worth cleaning up.

server.py startup_seed: sprite auto-refresh triggers a full delete_many({built_in:true}) + re-insert whenever the new 'builtin-blob-afk' id is missing. This is idempotent but wipes any user edits made to built-in rows (expected by design, but should be documented).
Settings model has no validation constraints (e.g. cursor_theme accepts arbitrary strings; sprite_size/afk_timeout_sec unbounded). Recommend Literal/ge-le validators.
seed_data_creation: none (TEST_ prefixed sprites created and deleted within tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend now seeds 16 built-in sprites total (10 builtin-blob-* + 6 legacy creatures Tabby Cat/Lil Ghost/Pulse Star/Crimson Arrow/X-Burst/Minimize Pop). Settings defaults have state_map covering all 10 keys. Frontend has data-testid='system-tray' in top bar, 'window-header-{app}' / 'window-close-{app}' / 'window-minimize-{app}' / 'window-resize-{app}' naming for windows, and 'dock-{app}' for dock launchers. Note: there is no 'dock-readme' button — readme opens on boot as the default window. Transient states (minimize/close/drag-pulse) last only a few hundred ms, so sampling state-indicator >500ms after click may miss them; drag/resize states remain while mouse is held.
verified_flows: GET /api/sprites returns all 10 builtin-blob-* ids with base64 PNG frames
GET /api/settings returns new fields (cursor_theme=zombie, cursor_size=md, show_in_tray=true, click_flash=false, afk_timeout_sec=30, reduce_motion=false) + 10-key state_map
PUT /api/settings accepts partial updates for all 6 new fields and persists them
PUT /api/settings partial state_map updates preserve all 10 keys
system-tray chip visible in top bar, click opens Settings singleton
cursor-theme-select -> 'classic' swaps desktop-root class zombie-cursor -> classic-cursor
Media app play-music-btn -> state:music; play-video-btn -> state:video; play-audio-btn -> state:audio (briefly); media-stop-btn clears ambient back to idle
Dragging README header while ambient=music yields state:drag (user gesture wins over ambient)
